title: Dense Rank Orders
description: Assign dense ranks to orders based on amount in descending order.
sql_solution: SELECT amount, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY amount DESC) rank FROM orders;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

ranking_window = Window.orderBy(col("amount").desc())

result = orders.withColumn("rank", dense_rank().over(ranking_window)).select("amount", "rank")
